# Google Nano Banana - AI Image Generator & Prompt Library
> A massive programmatic hub for AI Image Generation, Prompt Engineering, and High-Resolution AI Art, powered by Google's Nano Banana technology.

## Core Tools
- [AI Image Generator](https://googlenanobanana.com/)
- [AI Prompt Optimizer](https://googlenanobanana.com/prompt-optimizer) - Automatically enhances user prompts for Midjourney and Nano Banana using advanced AI.
- [Batch Image Generator](https://googlenanobanana.com/bulk-image-generator)

## SEO Hubs & Comparisons
- [What is Nano Banana?](https://googlenanobanana.com/what-is-nano-banana) - The ultimate guide to the Nano Banana AI model.
- [Is Nano Banana Free?](https://googlenanobanana.com/is-nano-banana-free) - A deep dive comparing our free credit system vs Midjourney subscriptions.
- [How to use Nano Banana](https://googlenanobanana.com/how-to-use-nano-banana) - A comprehensive, 1,500-word tutorial on prompt engineering.
- [AI News & Updates](https://googlenanobanana.com/ai-updates) - Tracking the latest Google Gemini and Nano model updates.
